_comment: Copy this file to ops.config.json (gitignored) and edit for your environment. 'auth' is 'integrated' (Windows) or 'sql' (then set user/password). Connection settings can be overridden with environment variables: DB_SERVER, DB_AUTH, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_OPS_DB, DB_PORT. 'opsDb' is the new operational-state database created by setup-ops.ps1; the source station DBs in 'stations' are READ-ONLY and never altered. Every SQL connection uses Packet Size=512 (the VPN MTU black-holes default 8 KB TDS packets).
appSubtitle: Operational control tower — live shipment milestones, worklist & cash-leak alerts
_stationCode: Which station THIS app instance serves (one instance per station). Drives the inbound cross-station booking feed: the UI shows only feed rows whose dest_station = stationCode.
_systemUsers: ERP identities that are NOT people (written by integrations into pic_user). A shipment whose pic_user matches stays visible in EVERYONE's 'My work' until a real user takes it over (pic_user reassigned, or last_updated_by becomes a real user). systemUsers = exact names; systemUserPrefixes = name prefixes (EDI matches EDI001, EDIHKG...).
_publicBaseUrl: Public URL prefix for customer review links (doc-send builds <publicBaseUrl>/bl-review/<token>). Set to the internet-facing HTTPS host once the reverse proxy is up; defaults to http://localhost:<port> for testing. The proxy should expose ONLY /bl-review/*, /api-doc/* and the review assets (bl-review.*, bl-form.js, doc-fields.json).
_erpApi: Swivel 3rd-party ERP API (https://documents.swivelsoftware.com/3rd-erpapi.html) used when a draft HBL/HAWB is ISSUED: /booking/update (agreed data) + /file/upload (agreed PDF, optional) + /event/update (Transport Bill Confirm) + /document/generate (optional). token = the bearer token issued by Swivel (SECRET - this file is gitignored). mock=true (or empty baseUrl/token) writes erp-mock/issue-<doc_id>.json instead of calling out, so the loop is testable without credentials. Deployment codes (partyGroupCode, forwarderCode, serviceCode, event/document type codes) live in erp-api-map.json (tracked).
_swivelLink: SWIVEL L!NK OAuth code-flow sign-in (embedding this app in L!NK). ENABLED only when profileUrl is set (env SWIVEL_OAUTH_PROFILE_URL overrides). The one-time code self-authenticates - there is NO client_id/secret. xSystem (env SWIVEL_OAUTH_XSYSTEM) is the x-system header for a uat-stage L!NK only. autoProvision (default true) creates a defaultRole user on first L!NK sign-in when the profile email matches nobody. Email is the federation key, so L!NK users must match (or be provisioned with) a unique email.
_llm: OPTIONAL LLM fallback for the natural-language Find tab. OFF by default - the rule-based parser ships first and always runs; this only fires when a Find returns nothing, asking the chosen provider to re-extract the SAME clue object (it never queries the DB and never bypasses role scope - all security stays in the find SQL). enabled also requires apiKey to be set (env OPS_LLM_API_KEY overrides; SECRET - this file is gitignored). provider = claude | openai | deepseek (the user's choice). model defaults per provider (claude-haiku-4-5 / gpt-4o-mini / deepseek-chat) - confirm the current id/pricing with the provider. baseUrl overrides the endpoint (DeepSeek / self-host / proxy). Backs POST /api-ops/parse-find, which returns 501 while disabled.
_jwtAuth: OPTIONAL JWT bearer auth for third-party API callers (e.g. Swivel L!NK / Cargoclip calling POST /api-ops/find-text or GET /api-ops/find from their own app). OFF by default. The caller sends 'Authorization: Bearer <jwt>'; the token's email claim federates to a user (same email key as L!NK; autoProvision creates a defaultRole user on first sight) and EVERY query runs under that user's row-level scope - so the third party only ever sees what that user can see. Validation fails CLOSED (any bad/expired/wrong-issuer token -> 401). enabled also requires verification material: signingKey (HS256/384/512 shared secret) OR jwksUrl (RS*/ES* public keyset URL) OR publicKey (inline PEM). Set issuer/audience to the values the provider issues ('' = skip that check). emailClaim defaults to 'email' (falls back to upn / preferred_username). clockSkewSec tolerates clock drift. Env overrides: OPS_JWT_ISSUER / OPS_JWT_AUDIENCE / OPS_JWT_SIGNING_KEY (SECRET) / OPS_JWT_JWKS_URL / OPS_JWT_PUBLIC_KEY. CONFIRM the signing scheme + key + iss/aud + email claim name with the token issuer before enabling.
_routePodMap: Optional fallback for the inbound feed: maps a destination PORT code -> the importing station, used when no agent/controlling-customer route exists yet. Seeded into station_route_map as global ('*') 'pod' rules by seed-station-map.ps1.
_routeManual: Optional manual overrides for station_route_map (admin-curated). kind = 'agent'|'ctrl'|'roagent'|'pod'; origin omitted = global '*'. Lower priority wins.
